title: Ametek Tolhurst Center Slung Batch-O-Matic Perforated Basket Centrifuge
shortDescription: Ametek Tolhurst Center Slung Batch-O-Matic perforated basket centrifuge with Hastelloy C basket and contact parts, top load / bottom discharge, driven by an Oilgear hydraulic drive.
description: (AMETEK) Tolhurst Center Slung Batch-O-Matic; Hastelloy C basket and contact parts; perforated basket; top load and bottom discharge; 75-500-1000 RPM basket speed; Oilgear hydraulic drive; top cover 316SS external with Hastelloy C cladding; basket Hastelloy C; housing is carbon steel with Hastelloy C cladding.

specs.label: Housing
specs.value: Carbon steel with Hastelloy C cladding

title: Complete Bobbin Dyeing Plant
shortDescription: Complete bobbin dyeing plant built up from multiple Flainox ATR/OR/HT dyeing machines (1988-2001), gear loop baskets, Dettin and Galvanin loading/unloading robots, and Dettin air dryers.
description: Complete Bobbin Dyeing Plant consisting of: 1 x Flainox mod. ATR/OR/HT, year 1988, capacity 250 kilos; 2 x Flainox mod. ATR/OR/HT, year 1988, capacity 600 kilos each (can work in tandem); 1 x Flainox mod. ATR/OR/HT, year 1994, capacity 100 kilos; 2 x Flainox mod. ATR/OR/HT, year 1994, capacity 600 kilos each (can work in tandem); 2 x Flainox mod. ATR/OR/HT, year 2001, capacity 600 kilos each (can work in tandem); 53 gear loop baskets; 1 x Dettin mod. DT.40, year 1994, robot for centrifuge and bobbin unloading; 1 x Galvanin mod. RBT/CRG, year 1994, bobbin loading robot; 1 x Galvanin mod. RBT/CSR, year 1994, centrifuge and bobbin unloading robot; 1 x Dettin mod. DT.40, year 2002, centrifuge and bobbin unloading robot; 2 x Dettin air dryer mod. AR22.75, year 2003.

title: Dorr-Oliver Merco 16L Decanter Centrifuge, 316 S/S
shortDescription: Used Dorr-Oliver Merco 16L solid-bowl decanter centrifuge in 316 stainless steel product-contact construction with a 30 HP drive and ECB backdrive.
description: Used Dorr-Oliver Merco 16L Solid Bowl Decanter Centrifuge, 316 stainless steel construction (product contact area), maximum bowl speed 4000 rpm, 5" double lead conveyor with welded hardfacing, auger style solids discharge, plate dam liquid discharge, base, discharge chutes, bowl cover, 30hp drive motor, ECB backdrive, belt guard, serial# 70022-8.

title: Flottweg S3E-3/408 Sedicanter Centrifuge, 316SS
shortDescription: Flottweg S3E-3/408 sedicanter centrifuge in 316 stainless steel, 2011 vintage, unitized on a stainless skid and in excellent running condition.
description: Max bowl speed 7750 RPM, 10,100 x G, rated @ 1 TPH, 4" single lead TC spray conveyor, 15 KW motor 460/3/60, 4 KW backdrive, SIMP-drive 48.7:1 gearbox, feed tube, lube system, vibration switch/isolators, guards, chutes and control panel. Unitized on a SS skid. 2011 vintage. Excellent running condition.

title: GEA Westfalia Desludger Disc Centrifuge, Model HSA 200-36-777
shortDescription: Used GEA Westfalia stainless steel desludger disc centrifuge, clarifier (liquid/solids separation) hermetic design with centripetal-pump liquid discharge and belt drive.
description: Used GEA Westfalia Stainless Steel Desludger Disc Centrifuge. Clarifier design (liquid/solids separation), hermetic design, centripetal pump liquid discharge. Belt drive, water harness and some tools.

title: Joflo 18" x 10" Perforate Basket Centrifuge, 316SS
shortDescription: Joflo 18" x 10" perforate basket centrifuge in 316 stainless steel, sanitary top-unload flip-top design with VFD-controlled 1.5 KW XP motor, unitized on a portable skid.
description: Max bowl speed 2000 RPM, 1025 x G, 457 x 250mm basket ID, 29 L cake volume, 0.36 sqM filtration area, top unload, full body opening (flip top), sanitary design, 1.5 KW XP motor 230/3/60/3600 RPM with VFD, feed and rinse pipes, safety interlock, sight glass, XP control panel, unitized on a portable skid. One year full mechanical warranty.

specs.label: Unloading
specs.value: Top unload, full body opening (flip top)

title: Kokusan H-131 Basket Centrifuge
shortDescription: Kokusan H-131 stainless steel solid-bowl basket centrifuge, 26" x 12", top load / bottom unload with tripod suspension, double-motion plow and skimmer, powered by an 11 kW motor.
description: Stainless steel solid bowl basket centrifuge: 26" x 12". Max bowl speed 2600. Top load, bottom unload, tripod suspension system, double motion plow assembly, skimmer assembly, feed pipe, top cover with inspection door, and spindle-bearing lubrication system. Powered by an 11 kW motor.

title: M-I SWACO 414 Barite-Recovery Decanter Centrifuge
shortDescription: M-I SWACO 414 barite-recovery decanting centrifuge with a stainless steel bowl and scroll, engineered for oilfield and industrial solids-control applications.
description: This barite-recovery decanting centrifuge is engineered to deliver high performance at low operating costs for both oilfield and industrial applications. The advanced design of the stainless steel bowl and scroll maintains an even layer of conveyed solids for more uniform separation and maximum solids-control efficiency.

specs.label: Application
specs.value: Barite recovery / solids control (oilfield and industrial)

title: Robatel BXP-800 800mm Mono-Stage Extractor Centrifuge, 316L SS
shortDescription: Used vertical 316L stainless steel Robatel BXP-800 mono-stage extractor centrifuge, 800mm diameter, 320 liter bowl, 40 HP drive, built 2015.
description: Used vertical 316L stainless steel mono-stage extractor centrifuge. Manufactured by Robatel, Model BXP-800. 320 liters, bowl speed 1400, G-force 756, 800mm diameter, 40 HP drive rating. Built 2015.

title: Sharples Mark III Perforate Basket Centrifuge, 316SS
shortDescription: Reconditioned Sharples Mark III model 3PP-350H perforate basket centrifuge in 316 stainless steel, unitized on a skid with full mechanical warranty.
description: Max bowl speed 3250, 2100 Gs, model 3PP-350H, 14 x 6" basket ID. 2 HP variable speed hydraulic drive 208/230/3/60/3450 RPM, fumetite design, braking system, feed and wash pipes, vents, belt guard and controls. Unitized on a skid. Reconditioned with full mechanical warranty.

title: Sharples P-600 Horizontal Solid Bowl Decanter Centrifuge, S/S
shortDescription: Used Sharples P-600 horizontal solid-bowl decanter centrifuge in stainless steel with anti-friction roller bearings and standard case and cover, rated to 5000 RPM.
description: Used Sharples Model P-600 Horizontal Solid Bowl Decanter Centrifuge, stainless steel construction, anti-friction roller bearings, standard case and cover, 5000 RPM, serial# 62-P600D-232.

title: Sharples P3400 Decanter Centrifuge, S/S
shortDescription: Used Sharples P3400CP ME Super-D-Canter decanter centrifuge with stainless steel product-contact surfaces, 50 HP bowl drive and 10 HP AC backdrive with P125 planetary gearbox and ABB VFD controllers, mounted on a high stand.
description: Used Sharples decanter centrifuge, model P3400CP ME S-D-C. Stainless steel product contact surfaces, 360 discharge with tiles and solids slingers, single lead conveyor with hard surfacing, 50 hp 230/460 volt bowl drive, 10 hp 230/460 volt AC back drive with P125 planetary gearbox, with ABB AC VFD controllers, stainless steel case and cover, on high stand.

specs.label: Solids discharge
specs.value: 360 discharge with tiles and solids slingers
